title: Datasets for the manuscript "Mapping Shared and Unique Features in Spatial Transcriptomics Through Multivariate Curve Resolution"
author: Jaumot, Joaquim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset originates from an experimental study on gonad development in sea bass males at different early maturation stages. Gonads from four individuals (G1-G4) were collected, snap-frozen, and processed for spatial transcriptomics using Visium technology (10X Genomics). Tissue sections were embedded in OCT, cryosectioned, and mounted onto spatial gene expression slides. Transcriptomic analysis involved fixation, staining, cDNA synthesis, and PCR amplification, followed by sequencing on a NovaSeq PE150 platform, yielding 5 Gbp of raw data. This dataset provides high-resolution spatial gene expression data for studying gonadal development and early puberty in sea bass.

This dataset provides high-resolution spatial gene expression data for studying gonadal development and early puberty in sea bass.
